key_user_simplifications: unfinished templates block use until completed or removed

changes: Closed shared output/template subflow as reusable block for all four startup branches.
Added free-form new artifact intent capture after showing available terminal state fields.
Added artifact intent confirmation before recipe/template authoring.
Output recipes now capture direct inserts, generated sections, generation instructions, and state-field mapping.
Added file-first review package generation for document-like artifacts: template, mock-filled example, mapping report, assumptions/risks summary.
Simplified user review result handling to confirm/revise/defer/remove artifact.
Deferred template decisions now become unfinished templates; final gate blocks artifact use until completion or removal.
Added terminal output binding confirmation and tightened terminal path ready check.
